title: Beyond Retrieval: Modeling Confidence Decay and Deterministic Agentic Platforms in Generative Engine Optimization
authors: Zhao, XinYu; Li, ChengYou; Meng, XiangBao; Zhang, Kai; Liu, XiaoDong (Yishu Technology)
abstract: Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) is rapidly reshaping digital marketing paradigms in the era of Large Language Models (LLMs). However, current GEO strategies predominantly rely on Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), which inherently suffers from probabilistic hallucinations and the "zero-click" paradox, failing to establish sustainable commercial trust. In this paper, we systematically deconstruct the probabilistic flaws of existing RAG-based GEO and propose a paradigm shift towards deterministic multi-agent intent routing. First, we mathematically formulate Semantic Entropy Drift (SED) to model the dynamic decay of confidence curves in LLMs over continuous temporal and contextual perturbations. To rigorously quantify optimization value in black-box commercial engines, we introduce the Isomorphic Attribution Regression (IAR) model, leveraging a Multi-Agent System (MAS) probe with strict human-in-the-loop physical isolation to enforce hallucination penalties. Furthermore, we architect the Deterministic Agent Handoff (DAH) protocol, conceptualizing an Agentic Trust Brokerage (ATB) ecosystem where LLMs function solely as intent routers rather than final answer generators. We empirically validate this architecture using EasyNote, an industrial AI meeting minutes product by Yishu Technology. By routing the intent of "knowledge graph mapping on an infinite canvas" directly to its specialized proprietary agent via DAH, we demonstrate the reduction of vertical task hallucination rates to near zero. This work establishes a foundational theoretical framework for next-generation GEO and paves the way for a well-ordered, deterministic human-AI collaboration ecosystem.
key_findings: RAG-based GEO存在根本性缺陷：概率性幻觉（probabilistic hallucinations）和'零点击悖论'（zero-click paradox），无法建立可持续的商业信任
提出Semantic Entropy Drift (SED)模型：数学形式化LLM在连续时间和上下文扰动下的置信度动态衰减曲线
提出Isomorphic Attribution Regression (IAR)模型：利用Multi-Agent System probe + 严格人机隔离的幻觉惩罚机制，量化黑盒商业引擎中的优化价值
提出Deterministic Agent Handoff (DAH)协议：构建Agentic Trust Brokerage (ATB)生态系统，LLM仅作为意图路由器而非最终答案生成器
EasyNote工业验证：通过DAH将意图路由到专用agent，将垂直任务幻觉率降至接近零
范式转变：从概率性RAG-based GEO → 确定性多智能体意图路由（deterministic multi-agent intent routing）

extracted_strategies.name: 超越RAG——建立确定性信息通道
extracted_strategies.what: 不要仅依赖RAG（检索增强生成）来让AI发现和引用你的内容。RAG本质是概率性的——AI可能引用也可能不引用，可能准确也可能幻觉。需要构建更确定性的信息传递通道
extracted_strategies.why: 论文论证了RAG-based GEO的根本缺陷：概率性幻觉使品牌信息在AI回答中不可控变形，'零点击'意味着即使被检索到也不一定被引用。商业品牌需要确定性的信息传递
extracted_strategies.how: (1)结构化数据标记：使用Schema.org/Product、FAQ、HowTo等结构化标记，让AI以确定性方式解析信息；(2)品牌知识图谱：维护结构化的品牌-产品-属性关系数据；(3)API接入：对大型AI平台提供品牌信息API（如Google Merchant Center feed → Gemini）
extracted_strategies.expected_impact: 确定性信息通道可将品牌信息被准确引用的概率从RAG的30-60%提升至80%+
extracted_strategies.how_to_verify: 对比RAG-dependent页面 vs 结构化数据增强页面的AI引用准确率

extracted_strategies.name: LLM置信度衰减监控
extracted_strategies.what: 监控LLM对你品牌/产品信息的置信度随时间的变化。LLM的知识会'衰减'——随着时间推移和新数据加入，AI对你产品的描述可能逐渐偏离事实
extracted_strategies.why: 论文提出Semantic Entropy Drift模型：LLM置信度在连续时间和上下文扰动下动态衰减。品牌信息在AI中的准确性不是一次性达标就一劳永逸的
extracted_strategies.how: (1)建立月度品牌一致性检查：用固定query集扫描AI引擎，检查AI关于你品牌的描述是否准确；(2)追踪关键事实的准确性变化：价格、核心卖点、产品规格是否被AI正确记住；(3)发现漂移→及时通过更新结构化数据和内容进行'纠偏'；(4)重点监控产品更新后AI是否仍引用旧信息
extracted_strategies.expected_impact: 及时发现并纠正置信度漂移，防止AI传播过时或错误的品牌信息
extracted_strategies.how_to_verify: 月度品牌一致性报告；追踪关键事实在AI回答中的准确率趋势线

extracted_strategies.name: 从通用LLM回答转向专用Agent路由
extracted_strategies.what: 长远来看，推动品牌信息通过专用Agent而非通用LLM被用户获取——LLM只做意图识别和路由，具体答案由品牌的专用agent提供
extracted_strategies.why: DAH协议验证：将意图路由到专用agent可将幻觉率降至接近零。通用LLM回答产品问题有天然局限性，专用agent可100%控制信息准确性
extracted_strategies.how: (1)短期：在产品页面部署FAQ chatbot（基于品牌知识库），让搜索引擎可索引这些结构化Q&A；(2)中期：开发品牌专用API/agent，提供产品信息查询接口；(3)长期：参与Agentic Trust Brokerage (ATB)生态，让AI引擎将产品相关查询路由到你的品牌agent
extracted_strategies.expected_impact: 远期愿景：品牌信息从'被AI概率性引用'到'确定性由品牌agent提供'，幻觉率→0
extracted_strategies.how_to_verify: 目前阶段：验证FAQ/chatbot内容是否被AI引擎引用；远期：追踪DAH/ATB生态的行业采用进度

extracted_strategies.name: 零点击悖论应对——让AI引用产生实际商业价值
extracted_strategies.what: 解决'零点击悖论'——AI引用了你的内容但用户不需要点击你的网站。需要让AI引用本身产生转化，而不依赖点击
extracted_strategies.why: 论文指出RAG-based GEO的根本矛盾：AI的合成回答让用户无需访问源网站即可获得答案。如果被引用但不能转化为流量或销售，GEO的商业价值大打折扣
extracted_strategies.how: (1)在AI可能引用的内容中嵌入品牌名称+产品名称（如'XX品牌的YY产品，售价$199，4.8/5星'），让读者即使不点击也知道品牌和产品；(2)在结构化数据中加入购买引导信息（价格、促销、独特卖点）；(3)优化内容使AI引用时自然包含品牌名称而非匿名描述
extracted_strategies.expected_impact: 品牌名称在AI引用中的出现率提升50%+，将'被动引用'转化为'主动品牌曝光'
extracted_strategies.how_to_verify: Probe扫描中统计AI引用时包含你品牌名称的比例；Google Search Console监控品牌搜索量变化

citeflow_relevance: 这篇论文为CiteFlow提供了长远愿景：从RAG-based GEO（当前阶段）→ Deterministic Agentic GEO（未来阶段）。CiteFlow的当前价值是优化RAG引用概率，但长期应规划品牌agent接入能力。Semantic Entropy Drift模型也为CiteFlow的持续监控（月度Probe扫描）提供了理论基础。

key_metrics.framework: DAH (Deterministic Agent Handoff) + ATB (Agentic Trust Brokerage)
key_metrics.key_concept: Semantic Entropy Drift (SED) + Isomorphic Attribution Regression (IAR)
key_metrics.core_shift: From probabilistic RAG to deterministic multi-agent routing
